markets.no_sub_title: Before Mar 27, 2026
markets.rules_primary: If Senate has conducted any recorded vote on the SAVE America Act before Mar 27, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
This includes:
Roll call votes
Recorded votes
Yea-and-nay votes
Electronic votes (in the House)
Division/standing votes

The following do NOT satisfy the Payout Criterion:
Voice votes where individual member positions are not recorded
Unanimous consent agreements without a recorded vote
Votes in committee (unless SAVE America Act specifically refers to a committee vote)
Procedural determinations by the presiding officer
Deemed passage without an actual vote

For clarity:
A vote on cloture (Senate) regarding SAVE America Act DOES satisfy the Payout Criterion
A vote on the rule governing debate of SAVE America Act (House) DOES satisfy the Payout Criterion if SAVE America Act specifically refers to that rule
A vote on a motion to proceed to SAVE America Act (Senate) DOES satisfy the Payout Criterion
A vote on final passage DOES satisfy the Payout Criterion
A vote on an amendment to SAVE America Act does NOT satisfy the Payout Criterion unless SAVE America Act specifically refers to that amendment
markets.title: Will the Senate vote on SAVE America Act?

markets.rules_secondary:
This includes:
Roll call votes
Recorded votes
Yea-and-nay votes
Electronic votes (in the House)
Division/standing votes

The following do NOT satisfy the Payout Criterion:
Voice votes where individual member positions are not recorded
Unanimous consent agreements without a recorded vote
Votes in committee (unless SAVE America Act specifically refers to a committee vote)
Procedural determinations by the presiding officer
Deemed passage without an actual vote

For clarity:
A vote on cloture (Senate) regarding SAVE America Act DOES satisfy the Payout Criterion
A vote on the rule governing debate of SAVE America Act (House) DOES satisfy the Payout Criterion if SAVE America Act specifically refers to that rule
A vote on a motion to proceed to SAVE America Act (Senate) DOES satisfy the Payout Criterion
A vote on final passage DOES satisfy the Payout Criterion
A vote on an amendment to SAVE America Act does NOT satisfy the Payout Criterion unless SAVE America Act specifically refers to that amendment
markets.title: Will the Senate vote on SAVE America Act?
markets.yes_sub_title: Before Mar 20, 2026
